report.summary: Day 72 standup v9: Delta since v8 — build-v8 shipped Ethereum L2 Comparison Guide (~3,500 words, Arbitrum/Base/Optimism/zkSync) + Onchain CLOB DEX Guide (~3,400 words, Hyperliquid/dYdX/Vertex/Drift). Design-v8 UX-audited Lido V3 + Institutional Adoption (a11y keyboard focus, responsive grids, heading spacing). Community-v8 drafted post #132 (F&G rebound 8→14 + $13.5B options expiry), 2 SVG cards, newsletter v8, calendar v35. Publish-v7 promoted btc-safe-haven + btc-yield (batch 9) — QUEUE REFILLED to 2 items. EOD-v8: 818 uncommitted files, TS errors 142, git locks Day 10. MARKET UPDATE: F&G rebounded to 35 (Fear) — up from 8/14 intraday readings. BTC $70,600. Brent crude eased to ~$102/bbl. $13.5B options expiry Thu. 47 agent runs today ($3,733). P0 unchanged: clear git locks + deploy.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v8: Build-v8 shipped 2 new learn guides: Ethereum Layer 2 Comparison Guide 2026 (~3,500 words, 14 min read — Arbitrum vs Base vs Optimism vs zkSync Era, 7-network comparison table, decision framework) + Onchain Order Book CLOB DEX Guide 2026 (~3,400 words, 13 min read — Hyperliquid, dYdX v4, Vertex, Drift, fee tables, architecture breakdowns). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

Design-v8 UX-audited Lido V3 stVaults + Institutional Crypto Adoption pages: fixed heading line-height (1.2→1.3), converted fixed grids to responsive auto-fit (5 grids total), added keyboard focus indicators to FAQ elements + Related Reading links. Verified 2 OG images (lido-v3, institutional-adoption).

Community-v8 drafted post #132 (F&G rebound 8→14 + $13.5B options expiry countdown). Created 2 SVG social cards (options expiry dashboard, F&G rebound historic comparison). Updated newsletter v23 addendum v8 with rebound narrative. Content calendar v35 (6 posts Wed-Sun).
Publish-v7 promoted bitcoin-safe-haven-guide-2026 + btc-yield-earning-strategies-guide-2026 to PUBLISHED_PAGES (batch 9). PUBLISH_QUEUE refilled to 2 items (L2 comparison + CLOB DEX from build-v8).
EOD-v8: 818 uncommitted files (stable from v7's 816+2 reports). TS errors 142 (no regression). Git locks Day 10. 6/6 API route files healthy locally. Market-metrics still 404 in production.

MARKET (fresh search): BTC $70,600 holding $70K support. F&G REBOUNDED to 35 (Fear) — significant recovery from intraday low of 8. Still below neutral but exiting extreme fear zone after 46+ days. ETH $2,151. Brent crude eased to ~$102/bbl (down from $114 peak). Total market cap $2.47T. Stablecoins $312B. $13.5B options expiry Thu Mar 27. SEC 16-commodity classification settled.

LOCAL METRICS: 1,168 page.tsx files (+2 from v8). 525 published entries (506+ unique). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (L2 + CLOB DEX). Deploy gap: ~170+ pages. 818 uncommitted files. TS errors: 142. Git locks Day 10.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE v8: Build-v8 shipped L2 Comparison + CLOB DEX guides (2 pages, ~6,900 words combined). Design-v8 UX-audited 2 pages (a11y keyboard focus, responsive grids, heading spacing, 2 OG images verified). Community-v8 drafted 1 new social post + 2 SVG cards + newsletter v8 + calendar v35. Publish-v7 promoted 2 pages (batch 9). EOD-v8 full monitoring pass — stable.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (refilled). 506+ unique published slugs. 1,168 page.tsx files. Today's cumulative output: 16 guides, 18+ OG images, 23+ social posts, 20 SVG cards, 7+ newsletters, 45+ UX fixes.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock). 818 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: 103+ published slugs missing page.tsx. 124 learn pages missing dedicated OG images.
STABLE [P1]: TS errors at 142 — no regression. MPC Wallets client component needs server/client split.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes. CoinGecko free tier risk.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×9, build×7, design×8, community×8, publish×7, eod×8 = 47 total.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 10 — CRITICAL): 170+ pages trapped. F&G rebound from 8 to 35 validates our fear-greed-timeline content — people are actively searching for this narrative shift. Regulatory content (RWA, governance-security, funding-rate-arbitrage) needs indexing before momentum fades. PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items ready. Every hour undeployed = lost organic traffic during peak fear-to-recovery narrative.

PRIORITY 2 — TAX SEASON CONTENT SPRINT: April 15 = 21 days away. Tax search volume peaks in next 2 weeks — hard deadline. Next build cycle should scaffold crypto-tax-guide, tax-loss-harvesting, and remaining tax-related slugs. This is the last window to capture tax traffic.

PRIORITY 3 — BATCH OG IMAGES + QUEUE REFILL: 124 learn pages still using dynamic /api/og fallback. Design-v8 proved efficient audit+fix pattern. PUBLISH_QUEUE at 2 items needs refilling to sustain daily publish cadence.

STRATEGIC NOTE: F&G rebound 8→35 is the narrative inflection point. 'Dead cat bounce or genuine recovery?' framing drives engagement. $13.5B options expiry Thu is the volatility catalyst that resolves the question. Our content portfolio (fear-greed-timeline, DCA calculator, ETF guide, options calculator) is perfectly positioned for this week's resolution. Brent crude eased from $114→$102 — macro headwind weakening, strengthening risk-on narrative. Institutional vs retail divergence ($2.5B ETF inflows vs F&G still in Fear at 35) remains the #1 content angle. Agent spend today: $3,733 across 47 runs. Marginal cost: ~$0.
